name: ng-tooltip
title: Tooltip (Angular)
description: Short non-essential context on hover/focus, built on Spartan-ng brain Tooltip. Reserve for non-critical supporting information - keyboard shortcuts, icon labels, "what does this do" hints. Mirrors React Tooltip from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-tooltip.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
